calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-22-2004 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-04-2004 Reset To Apr-22-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of the minors.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Susan Lee.
Petitioner, Genevieve Menendez present in pro per for the minors: Shavoni Nathaniel Mejia and Elijha Noel Mejia, was sworn and examined.
Application to dispense with notice filed and denied by the Court on March 4, 2004.
This matter is continued to April 22, 2004 at 9:00 a.m., for Petitioner to serve notice on Minor's father, deported to El Salvador and file proof of servie with the Court.
Order Continuing Hearing on Petition to Changes Name of Minors signed in open court.
